Solo Puzzle

Hotspot Mode
No internet? No problem. Host turns on hotspot, opponent connects — auto-match, no codes, 10-second countdown.
▸ 📡 How to connect
Host turns on mobile hotspot → opponent connects to that Wi-Fi → both open PUZZLR and tap Hotspot Mode. No internet needed.
Zero internet Local WiFi only 10s countdown

🎁 Playing offline? Send them the APK too — referrals earn you passes, hints & ad-free time!

How to Play
📖
How to Play
Master every mode in PUZZLR
🎯 Create Room
1
Set Your Gamer TagEnter a name your opponents will see during the race. This is your identity in every match.
2
Upload a PhotoPick any photo from your gallery. This becomes the puzzle. Choose something fun — the harder the image, the harder the puzzle!
3
Pick Grid SizeChoose from 3×3 (easy) up to 8×8 (expert, 64 pieces). More pieces = longer race.
4
Share the Room CodeA 6-character code appears. Send it to your friends — they enter it on the Join Room screen.
5
Start the RaceOnce your opponent joins the lobby, tap START. A 10-second countdown fires — then both screens unlock and the race begins.
6
Live StandingsThe leaderboard updates in real time as pieces are placed. First to complete the puzzle wins the round.
⚡ Single Player
1
Choose a Play ModePick Medal Hunt to chase specific medals with auto-set difficulty, or Free Play to race the clock at any grid size you want.
2
Medal Hunt — Select a MedalEach medal has a condition (e.g. finish in under 60 sec on 4×4). Tap the medal you want to attempt. Difficulty auto-sets to match.
3
Upload Your PhotoPick any photo from your gallery or use a built-in puzzle image. The image gets cut into your chosen grid size.
4
Solve the PuzzleDrag pieces to their correct positions. A timer tracks your time. Wrong placements give a wrong-move count — fewer wrongs = higher score.
5
Earn MedalsFinish within the medal's time target and with the right accuracy to unlock it. 50 medals total — collect them all to reach Emperor rank.
6
HintsStuck? Use a Hint Token to reveal one piece's correct position. Hints are earned through rewards — use them wisely.
7
PassesEach game uses 1 offline pass (or 0 if you're ad-free). Watch a rewarded ad to refill passes. Tier rewards grant large pass bundles.
🔗 Join Room
1
Get the Room CodeAsk the host to send you their 6-character room code. This code is shown on their screen after they create the room.
2
Set Your Gamer TagEnter your name so the host can see who joined. Keep it short and memorable.
3
Enter the Code & JoinPaste or type the 6-char code and tap JOIN. You'll land in the lobby and see the host's name.
4
Wait for the HostThe host controls when the race starts. Stay on the lobby screen — once the host taps START the countdown fires for both of you simultaneously.
5
Race!The host's photo loads on your screen, cut to their chosen grid size. Solve it faster than them to win. Standings update live.
📡 Hotspot Mode
1
No Internet NeededHotspot Mode works entirely over local Wi-Fi. Perfect for travel, areas without signal, or when data is limited.
2
Host Turns on HotspotThe host enables their phone's mobile hotspot in Android Settings. The device name becomes the network name.
3
Opponent Joins the HotspotThe other player connects to the host's Wi-Fi hotspot from their phone's WiFi settings. No data required.
4
Both Open PUZZLR & Tap Hotspot ModeThe host opens the APK and taps Hotspot Mode first to start the server. Guest taps Hotspot Mode to join.
5
Auto-Match in 10 SecondsNo code needed. The app finds the other player automatically over the local network. The countdown starts immediately after pairing.
6
Requires the APKHotspot Mode only works in the full PUZZLR APK (Android app). If you're in a browser, switch to Create Room / Join Room for online play instead.
🏅 Scoring, Medals & Ranks
🏆 Score — Based on time taken, grid size, and number of wrong moves. Faster & fewer wrongs = higher score.
💎 FLAWLESS — Complete a puzzle with zero wrong moves. Earns a Diamond bonus and counts toward the Diamond God badge.
🥉🥈🥇 Medal Hunt — 50 unique medals, each with time & accuracy conditions. Unlocked medals stack toward Emperor rank.
🎖 Prestige Badges — Earn permanent badges (Bronze Champion, Silver Legend, Gold Emperor, Diamond God, Mythic Tier & more) by hitting lifetime score and solve milestones.
👑 Emperor Rank — Collect all 50 medals to reach the highest rank in the game.
🎁 Rewards & Share Tiers
🔗 Link Your Account — Go to 🎁 Rewards and connect your Share Site account (daviduniverse.world). This lets rewards sync automatically.
📣 Share Your Code — Each tier has its own share code. When friends sign up on the Share Site using your invite link, it counts as a confirmation for that tier.
🥉 Starter Tier — 1 confirmation → +3 passes, +3 hints, 6h ad-free, 2× XP for 1 day.
🥈 Bronze Tier — 3 confirmations → +5 passes, +6 hints, 24h ad-free, 2× XP for 3 days.
🥇 Silver Tier — 5 confirmations → +10 passes, exclusive theme, 3-day ad-free, 2× XP for 7 days.
💎 Gold Tier — 10 confirmations → +20 passes, 2 premium themes, 7-day ad-free, 2× XP for 14 days.
👑 Elite Tier — 20 confirmations → +50 passes, ALL premium themes, 30-day ad-free, 2× XP for 30 days.
⏰ Reward Window — Once a tier completes, you have a limited window to claim your reward. Don't miss it — check the Rewards screen regularly.
💡 Pro Tips
🔍 Start with corners — corner pieces have the fewest possible positions. Lock them in first, then edges, then middle.
⏱ Practice on 3×3 first — build speed and muscle memory, then climb to larger grids for higher scores.
🎬 Watch 3 ads → 24h Ad-Free — use the Go Ad-Free card on the home screen before long sessions to remove interstitial ads.
📡 Hotspot works anywhere — perfect for travel, camping, or anywhere without Wi-Fi. Both players just need the APK installed.
💡 Save hints for big grids — hint tokens are limited. Don't waste them on 3×3. Burn them on 7×7 or 8×8 when you're stuck.
🎁 Share the APK = free rewards — every friend you get to install and register earns you tier progress. Share your link from the Tiers screen.
⚡ 2× XP windows — stack 2× XP from tier rewards during your hardest sessions to maximize lifetime score and unlock prestige badges faster.
